findings.message: No allowed-tools declared in frontmatter; command reads source files and system.md but tool access is undeclared
No allowed-tools declared in frontmatter; command reads and rewrites UI files but tool access is undeclared
No empty input handling; command assumes a file was just built and does not specify behavior when invoked with no recent build context
No allowed-tools declared; Implementation step 1 explicitly calls for Glob but no tools are declared in frontmatter
No allowed-tools declared; command loads a skill file via Read and may write system.md but tool access is undeclared
interface-design:init is the primary entry point for the plugin but is absent from the Commands listing at the bottom of SKILL.md (lines 388-391)
No allowed-tools declared; command reads system.md but tool access is undeclared
References non-existent file references/principles.md in Deep Dives section; code examples and dark mode detail are unreachable
References non-existent file references/validation.md in Deep Dives section; memory management and system.md update guidance is unreachable
References non-existent file references/critique.md in Deep Dives section; post-build critique protocol detail is unreachable
Vague quantifier: 'some decisions are creative and others are structural' — 'some' is imprecise in an instructional context
Scope section redirects to /frontend-design command which is not defined in this plugin or documented as a companion plugin
